Video.summary: Exes Caerya and James meet in court to settle a three-year debate over their son's paternity.
Video.title: Cox vs. Carswell

Video.summary: Shocking results of a paternity test will make or break Josh and Shaneka's 10-year relationship.
Video.title: Kellam vs. Bigby

Video.summary: Linda says John wrote an IOU for his DUI but he said he was drunk during signing.
Video.title: Too Sauced to Sign

Video.summary: A baby mama and grandma clash over who fathered the baby boy!
Video.title: Baby Mama Drama

Video.summary: Anastasia is a hair stylist here to sue one of her clients for an unpaid loan and emotional distress.
Video.title: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan

Image.alt: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan
Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan
Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan

Video.summary: Sexual frustrations and a gambling addiction threaten Drew and Aubrey's 16-year relationship as they battle for reconciliation.
Video.title: York-Ketner vs. Ketner

Video.summary: Demario and Necole’s relationship is tested when he tries to impose his conservative Christian values onto her.
Video.title: Scott vs. Thomas

Video.summary: When the Cowans find they’re growing apart after 10 years of marriage, they come before the judges for help.
Video.title: Cowan vs Cowan

Video.summary: Tajanea is suing her ex-boyfriend for over $2,000 after she claimed he damaged her car and apartment.
Video.title: Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship

Image.alt: Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship
Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship
Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship

Video.summary: First, these cousins clash over cash then they spar over cars and finally they moan over loans.
Video.title: Clash of the Cousins

Video.summary: Two sisters who were once tight are now torn apart. Silcray claims her younger sister stole her belongings. Sylvia is shocked and appaled that she'd be accused of such claims after taking her sister into her home.
Video.title: The Tale of Two Sisters

Video.summary: Richard argues that Tanya tried to leave his child's birthday party early so he had every right to stop her.
Video.title: The Princess Party Disaster

Video.summary: Exes duke it out in court over the paternity of a child.
Video.title: Cornell vs. Pruitt

Video.summary: A New Jersey woman sues her ex-boyfriend for property exchange of her beloved cat.
Video.title: Monsanto vs. Eskander

Video.summary: Dawn confronts her boyfriend, Josh, about ongoing entanglements with his ex and various other women.
Video.title: Jones vs. Shaffer

Video.summary: A sperm donor, suspicions of infidelity, and broken trust bring Shannon and Jasmine's rocky five-year romance to the courtroom.
Video.title: Bowman vs. Bennett

Video.summary: A Texas man suspects his girlfriend of cheating with the father of her children.
Video.title: Hicks vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Imani and LaBron face a high-stakes compatibility test to determine if their love and family can survive.
Video.title: Gordon vs. Watson

Video.summary: Yoko and Damien seek counsel from the judges on issues including parenting, property damage, and an online shopping addiction.
Video.title: Smith vs. Smith

Video.summary: Edgardo is accusing Arron of not paying his share of the rent, and is suing for what he thinks is owed.
Video.title: Roommate Rent Riot

Video.summary: Kevin wants his ex-fiancé to pay him back for a loan he gave her to pay off her credit card.
Video.title: Money Tears Apart A Relationship

Video.summary: Alfonso believes William deliberately set fire to his van to cover up the damages he caused.
Video.title: You Set My Van On Fire

Image.alt: You Set My Van On Fire
You Set My Van On Fire
You Set My Van On Fire

Video.summary: Arsenio is taking his ex-tenant to court after claiming she left the unit a mess including buckets of urine.
Video.title: Tenant Turmoil

Video.summary: Marlene says she rented a garage apartment in a house owed by the defendant’s mother, and when her son came to the house one day, she kicked her out and said he was moving in. When she told them she needed more than a few days to move, the man deliberately flooded the place. Andrew claims he gave Marlene 30 days to vacate and she didn’t comply. In the meantime the pipe burst and flooded the place. She’s suing for damages and he’s accused of lousy land lording.
Video.title: Lousy Land Lording

Video.summary: Tyrone claims his ex wife Tania got him falsely arrested 3 times so he's here to sue her for $3,000.
Video.title: Reformed Pimp Sues His Madam

Video.summary: Sarah sues her ex-husband for rent, saying their marriage fell apart due to trust issues and infidelity.
Video.title: Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads

Image.alt: Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads
Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads
Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads

Video.summary: A man says his ex vandalized his van, and while they were dating, she punched him in the face and ended up in jail.
Video.title: Trading Punches

Video.summary: Ebony is here to get help for her brother who's opioid addiction worsened after his wife overdosed.
Video.title: Hooked on Opioids

Video.summary: Raven says her friend started hooking up with her ex while they were in Las Vegas, so she's suing for the trip
Video.title: What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas

Image.alt: What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas
What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas
What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas

Video.summary: A woman accuses her cousin of crashing her car with the plaintiff's children inside.
Video.title: Mathis Take the Wheel

Video.summary: It's music biz mayhem when two men tangle over their boy band. Was it a record label rip off?
Video.title: The Reunion of Swag Kids

Video.summary: Ronald and Rhonda let a kitchen renovation bring out the worst in eachother.
Video.title: Relationship Renovations

Video.summary: Friends Matt and James said everything was ok until their other roommate, David, turned into Goliath and became a violent religious fanatic, slinging shoes and punching faces.
Video.title: The Christian Crusader

Video.summary: Deputy Payne responds to a vehicle on fire with a teenager trapped inside.
Video.title: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Image.alt: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Video.summary: Deputy Miller gets physical with an aggressive transient. Deputy Turnbull demonstrates an exercise in mental gymnastics.
Video.title: Hostile & Homeless

Video.summary: Deputy Braafladt attempts to find the man responsible for giving his girlfriend a black eye. A woman is arrested behind a closed business in the middle of the night.
Video.title: Abusing and Abusers

Video.summary: Deputy Payne exposes the jumbled and dysfunctional mind of a habitual alcoholic.
Video.title: Drunk as a Skunk

Video.summary: WENET and the SED demonstrate a large scale marijuana bust near an elementary school.
Video.title: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard

Image.alt: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard

Video.summary: The Western El Dorado Narcotics Enforcement Team shines a light on the destruction of our public land by illegal commercial Mexican cartel grows.
Video.title: Marijuana vs. the Environment

Video.summary: Deputy Fontana arrests a central figure in a major ID theft ring.
Video.title: Mobile ID Theft Factory

Video.summary: WENET breaks up a party to arrest a group of illegal Mexicans for cock fighting.
Video.title: Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People

Image.alt: Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People
Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People
Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People

Video.summary: Deputy Fontana responds to an overturned vehicle. An intoxicated driver is found sleeping behind the wheel of his vehicle.
Video.title: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Image.alt: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Video.summary: An uncooperative felon tests the patience of the SED.
Video.title: Special Enforcement Detail Work

Video.summary: Colorado Parole Officers relentlessly search for a fugitive but catch another fugitive and find a drug lab.
Video.title: Behind Closed Doors

Video.summary: A parolee tries to avoid arrest by hiding under a pile of clothing. A parolee thinks he can outrun agents.
Video.title: Expect the Unexpected

Video.summary: Between a search a chase in the snow a surrender and home visit the Agents have their work cut out for them.
Video.title: No Rest for the Wicked

Video.summary: A parolee tries to flee from the back of his house. A daylong search for drugs and weapons ends in an arrest.
Video.title: Flying the Coop

Video.summary: A parolee is busted while fleeing to his basement. A parolee misses resource meetings and is arrested.
Video.title: Life Underground
